package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_includes_setup_in_loop: Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag Go benchmarks that perform setup inside the timed loop without ResetTimer.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule574PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario574Positive(records []Rule574PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
